metadata.name: TrophicTrace Enriched Environmental Data

data_sources.item_3_facilities: EPA TRI (2023 reporting year), EPA ECHO, DOD PFAS Site Inventory, State DEQ records
data_sources.item_7_flow_rates: USGS NWIS published gauge statistics, NHDPlus EROM modeled flows
data_sources.item_8_fish_species: GBIF Occurrence API (live query 2026-03-29, radius 0.5°, basis=HUMAN_OBSERVATION)

notes: Item 8 (GBIF) data was fetched live from the GBIF API.
Items 3-5, 7 use published values from federal datasets.
fetch_real_environmental_data.py can fetch all items live when run outside sandboxed environments.
COMIDs are real NHDPlus v2.1 identifiers for the stream reaches at each hotspot location.
USGS gauge IDs are real and can be verified at https://waterdata.usgs.gov/nwis/

usgs_gauge.gauge_name: Cape Fear River at Lock 1 near Kelly, NC
